creator: fox@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 211153
Patch to update the ports script to support mariadb103-server 10.3.22 builds.

MariaDB has been updated to 10.3.22, and this also fixes some of the security vulnerabilities mentioned in 

https://vuxml.freebsd.org/freebsd/a6cf65ad-37d2-11ea-a1c7-b499baebfeaf.html

I have made a patch that updates the ports script to support building 10.3.22, the patch was tested in poudriere (11.3/12.1) and also did a local build in my machine (12.1-RELEASE/13.0-CURRENT) with all options enabled and it builds, installs and runs fine.

Let me know if this patch looks good and if it can be committed to the ports tree.

Build logs.

https://trouble.is/pkg/data/11i386-fox-fox/2020-01-29_04h37m41s/logs/mariadb103-server-10.3.22.log
https://trouble.is/pkg/data/11amd64-fox-fox/2020-01-29_04h37m42s/logs/mariadb103-server-10.3.22.log
https://trouble.is/pkg/data/12i386-fox-fox/2020-01-29_04h37m39s/logs/mariadb103-server-10.3.22.log
https://trouble.is/pkg/data/12amd64-fox-fox/2020-01-29_05h02m49s/logs/mariadb103-server-10.3.22.log

Thank you
